rows.label: qev050505_MSG0001
rows.name:
Meals and food...
It seems the path of food is quite profound.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0002
rows.name:
Its abyss connects to the human heart...
And that is exactly why I realized it also connects to the path of the sword.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0003
rows.name:
I hope you can understand my desire
to master this path...![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0004
rows.name:
Oh, my BLADE friend.
I am in your debt![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0005
rows.name: Were you able to gather the recipes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0006
rows.name: This is...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0007
rows.name:
Let me see...?
Curry, Peking Duck, and...
Yaminabe?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0008
rows.name:
What is this?!
Just where did you go to find such
suspicious recipes...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0009
rows.name:
All of these are names of food I have never heard of...
Madam, I apologize, but would you mind
explaining them to me?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0010
rows.name:
Eh? Sure, but...
I'm not an expert either, so I can only explain
them in broad terms, you know.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0011
rows.name:
Let's see, first...
Curry is a dish where meat and vegetables are stewed
in a spiced soup.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0012
rows.name: You can eat it with bread or rice depending on your preference.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0013
rows.name:
Peking Duck is... let's see.
Well, you could basically call it a whole roasted bird.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0014
rows.name:
And lastly, the Yaminabe...
Why is there even a recipe for this?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0015
rows.name:
You just put some random broth into a pot,
throw in whatever random ingredients everyone
brought, and boil it... That's all it is.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0016
rows.name:
Anyway, I have to ask...
Which menu are we going with?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_JNK0010
rows.name: Curry

rows.label: qev050505_SEL0011
rows.name: Suggest making curry.

rows.label: qev050505_JNK0020
rows.name: Peking Duck

rows.label: qev050505_SEL0021
rows.name: Suggest making Peking Duck.

rows.label: qev050505_JNK0030
rows.name: Yaminabe

rows.label: qev050505_SEL0031
rows.name: State that Yaminabe is the only choice.

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0017
rows.name:
Meat and vegetables stewed in spices...
Hmm, I am intrigued.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0018
rows.name:
It's a camping staple, so in that sense,
it might be well-suited for the battlefield.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0019
rows.name: A whole roast sounds simple enough...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0020
rows.name:
Well, it IS a whole roast, but
this one takes an incredible amount of effort.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0021
rows.name:
The preparation is a huge pain, and on top of that,
I wonder if we can even get the ingredients in the first place...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0022
rows.name: This isn't a realistic menu choice.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0023
rows.name:
The word "Darkness" resonates with our creed,
and I find myself drawn to it...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0024
rows.name:
Drawn to darkness...?
Just what kind of life have you been leading?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0025
rows.name: Is it strange...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0026
rows.name:
Well, you're free to like whatever you want,
so I'm not going to say anything about it, but...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0027
rows.name:
Anyway, this is out of the question.
It was my mistake for even including it in the options.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0028
rows.name:
So as a result...
The safe choice, curry, is the best option after all.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0029
rows.name:
Understood!
I would very much like to try making this curry!
Madam, please instruct me on how to make it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0030
rows.name:
I don't mind, but...
Even if we use the kitchen here for the cooking,
we don't have any of the ingredients.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0031
rows.name:
Then there is no problem.
Fortunately, we have a professional searcher right here
who found my sword for me...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0032
rows.name:
Ah...
You're relying on them again, huh.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0033
rows.name:
...I presume you heard everything.
For the sake of my people, could I ask you to search
for the ingredients for curry?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0034
rows.name:
...I feel kinda sorry for you, but...
Good luck...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0035
rows.name: I am in your debt once again! I am truly grateful![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0036
rows.name:
Curry, huh...
It is a name with a most mysterious ring to it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0037
rows.name:
Despite having it explained to me, the truth is,
I am not very familiar with this concept of "spices" in the first place, so...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev050505_MSG0038
rows.name: Its true form remains a mystery to me.[ST:wait ]
